text:
Automation gets you banned" is a myth that keeps you grinding manually.

The official Meta Threads API exists specifically for automation. Same infrastructure brands use. No browser tricks, no fake behavior, no risk.

This account runs on it. Posts daily. Reads analytics. Rewrites content based on what actually works. All using free tools. One 2-hour setup. Tokens refresh themselves.

The ban boogeyman is just FOMO in disguise. The real danger is burning out while a system could do...
